title: The Bitter Lesson
description: Rich Sutton on how general methods that leverage computation always win over methods that encode human knowledge.

title: Andrej Karpathy: The Unreasonable Effectiveness of Recurrent Neural Networks
description: A classic blog post showing what RNNs can do when trained on raw text. Still a delightful read.

title: Everything is a Remix
description: Kirby Ferguson's essay series on how creativity is built on copying, transforming, and combining.
